title: Hemianemia tripinnata

The plant belongs to the genus Hemianemia, which is part of the larger order Caryophyllales. The classification of Hemianemia tripinnata includes the kingdom Plantae, phylum Magnoliophyta, class Magnoliopsida, and order Caryophyllales. This plant has been used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, with reported health benefits including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which may help alleviate conditions such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues.
